StyledText.Data: Modify Sub Page item <<FAT Block @ Page item 2::Name>> in <<FAT Title::Reference title>>

Calculation.Text: "Save text changes to FAT"
"Create new or change block"
isEditor Or isTranslator
FAT Page item 2::PrimaryKey
"Delete this page item"
isEditor Or isTranslator

LayoutObject.name: PI navigation

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item::Name
Not IsEmpty(FAT Page item::DisplayMedia)
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::Number of page items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item 2::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
"Move up"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = 1 Or FAT Page::Proxy type ≠ ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::Number of pages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
"Move up"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = 1 Or FAT Page::Proxy type = ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::Number of page items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item 2::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
"Move up"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = 1 Or FAT Page::Proxy type ≠ ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::Number of pages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
"Move up"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = 1 Or FAT Page::Proxy type = ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::Number of page items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item 2::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
"Move down"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = Get(foundCount) Or FAT Page::Proxy type ≠ ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::Number of pages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
"Move down"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = Get(foundCount) Or FAT Page::Proxy type = ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::Number of page items )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item 2::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
"Move down"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = Get(foundCount) Or FAT Page::Proxy type ≠ ""
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::Number of pages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
"Move down"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Get(ActiveRecordNumber) ≠ Get(recordNumber) Or Get(recordNumber) = Get(foundCount) Or FAT Page::Proxy type = ""
FAT Block @ Page item::Name
IsEmpty(FAT Page item 2::DisplayMedia)
FAT Page item::Include in export = 0
FAT Page item::Include in export = 0
isEditor Or isTranslator
isTranslator
isTranslator
Self=""
Not FAT Page item::Include in export
FAT Page item 2::Parent id
"Add a new block directly after current block"
FAT Page item::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
FAT Page item::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
FAT Page item 2::PrimaryKey
"Open page item settings"
isEditor Or isTranslator
"Change current page item to a new block type"
FAT Page item::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
FAT Page item 2::PrimaryKey
"Duplicate the current page item with all content and settings"
isEditor Or isTranslator
FAT Block @ Page item::Name

LayoutObject.name: WebViewer Quill

Calculation.Text: "Insert media here"
FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers <1
Media PI 1 2::PrimaryKey
FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers <1

StyledText.Data: <<Media PI 1 2::Container original filename>> Width <<Media PI 1 2::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media PI 1 2::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media PI 1 2::Container file size readable>> Modified: <<Media PI 1 2::Container modified>>

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers <1
FAT Block @ Page item::Number of media containers <1
FAT Page item 2::Media 1 id
"View media subtitle"
Not SubtitleMedia ( Media PI 1::Container file extension )
FAT Page item 2::Media 1 id
"View media file"
IsEmpty ( Media PI 1::Media container ) Or Media PI 1::Container file extension = "json"
Media PI 1 2::Container file size warning ≠ "Warning"
"Open IO settings"

ScriptReference.name: View card Page item IO setting

Calculation.Text: FAT Page item 2::PrimaryKey
"Open IO settings"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled
SetProperty ( "itemType" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "command" ; "exclude" )
"Click to exclude item in export"
FAT Page item::Include in export = 0
SetProperty ( "itemType" ; "Page item 2" ) & SetProperty ( "command" ; "include" )
"Click to include item in export"
FAT Page item::Include in export = 1
Not FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled And Not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled
Not FAT Block @ Page item 2::Page item List enabled And Not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled Or isTranslator
Not FAT Block @ Page item 2::Page item List enabled Or Not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled Or isTranslator
"Add items"
Not FAT Block @ Page item 2::Page item List enabled Or isTranslator Or FAT Page item::List id
Not FAT Block @ Page item 2::Page item List enabled Or isTranslator Or FAT Page item::List id
"Select a list"
Not BlockTemplate @ Page item 2::List enabled
"Edit list"

FAT Block @ Page item 2::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) = 0 Or FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) = 1 Or FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) = 2 // See list layoutitems Excel in Funkis Development for explanation

LayoutObject.name: Page item List

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "list_item_id" ; FAT List item @ Page item 2::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item List" )

LayoutObject.name: T1

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item 2::Label override List Text 1
FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage
Length ( Self ) > BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters And BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters>0

LayoutObject.name: T1

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item 2::Label override List Text 1
FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage
Length ( Self ) > BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters And BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters>0
SetProperty ( "list_item_id" ; FAT List item @ Page item 2::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item List" )

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item 2::Label override List Text 1
Not FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage
Length ( Self ) > BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters And BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters>0

LayoutObject.name: T1 TRANS

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item 2::Label override List Text 1
Not FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage
Length ( Self ) > BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters And BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters>0
"Delete item"
FAT List item @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0
FAT List item @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0

FAT Block @ Page item 2::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) < 4 Or FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item::List id) = 7 // See list layoutitems Excel in Funkis Development for explanation /*FAT Page item::List id or not FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled*/

LayoutObject.name: List

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT List item @ List @ Page item 2
FAT List item @ List @ Page item

Calculation.Text: FAT List item @ List @ Page item::Media 1 id
FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Media
List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 1
FAT Block @ Page item::Label override List Media
List template @ Page item::Number of media containers < 1
SetProperty ( "ca_item_id" ; FAT List item @ List @ Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title CA" )

LayoutObject.name: T1 Trans LT

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT List item @ List @ Page item 2

Calculation.Text: "Enter text here"
List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 1 Or Not FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage
Length ( Self ) > BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters And BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters>0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::Include in export = 0

LayoutObject.name: T1 Trans LT

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT List item @ List @ Page item 2

Calculation.Text: "Enter text here"
List template @ Page item::Number of text fields < 1 Or Not FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage
Length ( Self ) > BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters And BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters>0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::Include in export = 0
SetProperty ( "list_item_id" ; FAT List item @ List @ Page item::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title List" )

FAT List item @ List @ Page item::Include in export = 0

Length ( Self ) > BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters And BlockTemplate @ Page item::List Text 1 max characters>0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::Include in export = 0
"Delete item"
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0
FAT List item @ List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0

FAT Block @ Page item 2::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item 2::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item 2::List id) < 2 Or FAT Block @ Page item 2::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item 2::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item 2::List id) = 4 Or FAT Block @ Page item 2::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item 2::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item 2::List id) = 5 Or FAT Block @ Page item 2::Page item List enabled * 4 + FAT Block @ Page item 2::List enabled * 2 + GetAsBoolean (FAT Page item 2::List id) = 6 // See list layout items Excel in Funkis Development for explanation /*(IsEmpty(FAT Page item::List id) and FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled) or not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled*/

ScriptReference.name: Create and add List to PI

Calculation.Text: Not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled Or FAT Page item::List id Or isTranslator

StyledText.Data: <<FAT Block @ Page item 2::Label override List header>>

Calculation.Text: Not FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled And Not FAT Block @ Page item::List enabled
"Page item 2"
FAT Page Block VL::Description
FAT Page Block VL::Description
FAT Page Block VL::Description
FAT Page Block VL::Description
FAT Page Block VL::Description
FAT Page Block VL::Description
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "view_block" ; FAT Page Block VL::PrimaryKey )
